blocker: No live GKE cluster / Prometheus access (interactive gcloud login required) and no LLM credits for the live-LLM proposer; live --prometheus/--live-llm path unexercised. Mitigated with a recorded-real metrics fixture + offline stub proposer so the harness and the no-execution safety guarantee are fully tested.
one_line: Built+tested a shadow-mode incident runner (observe real Prometheus telemetry, propose-but-never-execute remediation) with a structurally-enforced 'no action executed' guarantee verified by 6 passing pytest cases; live-cluster run documented as blocked.
